name: Farm Sausage
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds lean ground pork, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix all ingredients together with your hands if needed.
2. On wax paper, shape the mixture into two logs that are 6 inches long and 2 inches in diameter.
3. Wrap the logs tightly in plastic wrap or foil and refrigerate for at least 8 hours.
4. To serve, cut the logs into rounds about 1/2 inch thick and fry them in a heavy skillet over medium-low heat for 3 to 4 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
5. Drain on paper towels and serve immediately.
Notes:
An alternative method is to shape the mixture into large marble-sized balls. If desired, freeze them first. To serve, bake the frozen sausages in a preheated oven set to 325°F (starting from cold) for 20 minutes.
